goal: Measure whether the exact @voxxo/atlas 1.0.0 candidate improves deterministic relevant-file recall on fixed code-navigation tasks in its own repository versus a ripgrep-only baseline.

source.working_tree: The audited 1.0 promotion candidate plus this preregistration and its outcome-free runner. Both arms observe the same tree.

controls.corpus: The same repository working tree, honoring ignore files and excluding generated dependency/build/runtime directories.
controls.baseline: For each frozen term, ripgrep lists matching files. Files rank by number of distinct terms matched, then repository-relative POSIX path.
controls.treatment: The exact candidate performs one full index, then its structured search action answers each frozen query with includeTestFiles=true and limit=5.
controls.token_or_cost_reporting: not applicable; no provider is invoked and no token estimate is permitted
controls.failure_policy: Retain command failures, Atlas error results, warnings, incomplete result lists, ties, null findings, and negative treatment effects.
controls.timing: Wall-clock milliseconds are secondary environment-specific observations, not universal performance claims.

metrics.primary: macro mean recall@5 over the twelve tasks
secondary: tasks with at least one gold file retrieved
mean reciprocal rank of the first gold file

acceptance.interpretation: A release claim requires the Atlas arm to clear 0.8 and to beat the baseline point estimate. With twelve authored tasks this is descriptive evidence, not a population-level superiority claim.

tasks.query: worker supervisor crash recovery backpressure persistence
canonical path traversal symlink repository escape
current disk source overrides indexed metadata evidence authority
opaque cursor pagination character budget bounded query plan
operator memory migration preserves dedupe changelog relationships
atomic idempotent commit transaction provenance evidence
MCP structuredContent snake case wire conversion
project local user global data layout workspace identity
watcher debounce coalesce rename deterministic batch
embedding model dimension normalization identity mismatch
snapshot diff retained changelog id historical source
